---
id: create-multiple
title: "Create translation memory entries for multiple target languages"
description: "Atomic counterpart to the per-language POST. All entries land in one transaction, or none do — replaces the UI's previous per-language loop which could leave a partial result if a later language failed. The same target language must not appear twice in the same request."
sidebar_label: "Create translation memory entries for multiple target languages"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create translation memory entries for multiple target languages"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/organizations/{organizationId}/translation-memories/{translationMemoryId}/entries/multiple"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Atomic counterpart to the per-language POST. All entries land in one transaction, or none do — replaces the UI's previous per-language loop which could leave a partial result if a later language failed. The same target language must not appear twice in the same request.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./create-multiple.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./create-multiple.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./create-multiple.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
